title: Samui Elephant Sanctuary
shortDesc: Ethical elephant encounters — feed, bathe, and walk alongside rescued elephants.
description: Samui Elephant Sanctuary offers an ethical, no-riding experience where families can get up close with rescued elephants. Kids can hand-feed the elephants fruit, walk with them through the forest, and help with bathing time. Guides explain elephant conservation and Thai culture throughout. A truly memorable, educational experience for the whole family.
